message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): add transaction lifecycle, formal invariants, and MVCC foundations (bd-3go.5, bd-27nu)

Transaction lifecycle (lifecycle.rs):
- Define transaction state machine: Active → Committed | Aborted
- Implement version chain management and snapshot visibility rules
- Add read-write antidependency tracking for serializable snapshot isolation
- Support conflict detection logic for concurrent transaction writes

Formal invariants (invariants.rs):
- Formalize SSI isolation guarantees and serialization correctness properties
- Define monotonicity constraints on transaction clocks and version vectors
- Specify page-level MVCC invariants referenced by bd-3go.5 and bd-27nu

Core types (core_types.rs):
- Add supporting type definitions for transaction and MVCC state representation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
